class.name: GaussianData
class.brief_description: Resource that stores Gaussian splat datasets for runtime and editor workflows.
class.description: GaussianData is the canonical data container for the Gaussian Splatting module. It stores the per-splat payload, tracks metadata required by rendering and streaming systems, and exposes import/export-compatible data to other module components. Supports PLY and SPZ file formats, spherical harmonics up to degree 3, runtime modification overlays, brush stroke painting, animation, and octree-based spatial queries.

method.name: resize
method.description: Resizes the internal Gaussian storage to hold [param count] splats. Existing data beyond the new size is discarded.

method.name: set_positions
method.description: Sets the positions of all splats from a packed array. The array length determines the splat count.

method.name: set_scales
method.description: Sets the per-axis scale factors for all splats from a packed array.

method.name: set_rotations
method.description: Sets the orientation quaternions for all splats from a typed array of Quaternion values.

method.name: set_opacities
method.description: Sets the opacity values for all splats from a packed float array.

method.name: set_spherical_harmonics
method.description: Sets spherical harmonics coefficient data from a flat packed float array. The array is interpreted according to the current SH degree configuration.

method.name: get_spherical_harmonics
method.description: Returns the spherical harmonics coefficients for a single splat at [param splat_idx] as a packed float array.

method.name: has_full_sh
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the dataset contains higher-order spherical harmonics data beyond the DC term.

method.name: get_sh_degree
method.description: Returns the current spherical harmonics degree (0-3) computed from the stored coefficient count.

method.name: set_palette_ids
method.description: Sets the palette color lookup index for each splat. Used by the painterly rendering pipeline to select per-splat brush colors.

method.name: set_painterly_flags
method.description: Sets the painterly rendering flags bitfield for each splat. Controls per-splat stylization behavior in the GPU pipeline.

method.name: get_brush_override_ids
method.description: Returns the brush override IDs for all splats as a packed integer array. Each value selects a specific brush style in the painterly pipeline.

method.name: get_brush_override_ids_buffer
method.description: Returns the brush override IDs buffer. Functionally equivalent to [method get_brush_override_ids].

method.name: set_brush_override_ids
method.description: Sets the brush override IDs for all splats. Each value selects a brush style in the painterly rendering pipeline.

method.name: set_brush_axes
method.description: Sets the brush stroke axis vectors for each splat. Controls the orientation and aspect ratio of painterly brush strokes on the GPU.

method.name: set_stroke_ages
method.description: Sets the stroke age values for each splat. Used for temporal effects in the painterly rendering pipeline.

method.name: set_2d_mode
method.description: Enables or disables 2D surfel mode. When enabled, splats are rendered as oriented discs using surface normals instead of 3D ellipsoids.

method.name: get_2d_mode
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if 2D surfel rendering mode is active.

method.name: set_normals
method.description: Sets the surface normal vectors for all splats. Normals are used when 2D surfel mode is enabled for oriented disc rendering.

method.name: load_from_file
method.description: Loads Gaussian splat data from a PLY or SPZ file at the given [param path]. Returns [constant OK] on success or an error code on failure.

method.name: save_to_file
method.description: Saves the current Gaussian splat data to a file at the given [param path]. Returns [constant OK] on success.

method.name: build_octree
method.description: Builds an internal octree acceleration structure for spatial queries. [param max_depth] controls the tree depth limit and [param min_gaussians] sets the minimum splat count per leaf before subdivision stops.

method.name: query_octree
method.description: Returns indices of all splats whose positions fall within the given axis-aligned bounding box. Requires [method build_octree] to have been called first.

method.name: get_count
method.description: Returns the total number of Gaussian splats stored in this resource.

method.name: get_aabb
method.description: Computes and returns the axis-aligned bounding box enclosing all splat positions.

method.name: get_memory_usage
method.description: Returns the estimated CPU memory usage of the stored Gaussian data in bytes.

method.name: set_animation_state_machine
method.description: Assigns an animation state machine resource that drives per-splat animation of position, color, opacity, scale, and rotation over time.

method.name: get_animation_state_machine
method.description: Returns the animation state machine resource, or [code]null[/code] if none is assigned.

method.name: has_animation
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if an animation state machine resource is assigned and valid.

method.name: update_animation
method.description: Advances the animation by [param delta] seconds and updates the internal animation cache. Call this each frame for smooth playback.

method.name: apply_animation_at_time
method.description: Seeks the animation to an absolute [param time] in seconds and updates all animated properties. Useful for scrubbing or previewing specific frames.

method.name: set_animation_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables animation playback. When disabled, animated property queries return the base (non-animated) values.

method.name: is_animation_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if animation playback is enabled.

method.name: set_incremental_saver
method.description: Assigns an incremental saver resource for periodic background persistence of modifications.

method.name: get_incremental_saver
method.description: Returns the assigned incremental saver resource, or [code]null[/code] if none is set.

method.name: get_animated_position
method.description: Returns the animated position of the splat at [param index]. If [param time] is negative, uses the last cached animation time.

method.name: get_animated_color
method.description: Returns the animated color of the splat at [param index]. If [param time] is negative, uses the last cached animation time.

method.name: get_animated_opacity
method.description: Returns the animated opacity of the splat at [param index]. If [param time] is negative, uses the last cached animation time.

method.name: get_animated_scale
method.description: Returns the animated scale of the splat at [param index]. If [param time] is negative, uses the last cached animation time.

method.name: get_animated_rotation
method.description: Returns the animated rotation of the splat at [param index]. If [param time] is negative, uses the last cached animation time.

method.name: set_runtime_position
method.description: Overwrites the position of a single splat at [param index] in the runtime modification overlay. Does not alter the original resource data.

method.name: set_runtime_color
method.description: Overwrites the color of a single splat at [param index] in the runtime modification overlay. Does not alter the original resource data.

method.name: set_runtime_opacity
method.description: Overwrites the opacity of a single splat at [param index] in the runtime modification overlay. Does not alter the original resource data.

method.name: apply_color_range
method.description: Applies [param color] to [param count] splats starting at index [param start] in the runtime modification overlay.

method.name: mark_range_dirty
method.description: Marks [param count] splats starting at index [param start] as dirty, signaling the GPU buffer needs re-upload for that range.

method.name: commit_runtime_changes
method.description: Commits all pending runtime modifications into the main Gaussian storage. After this call, runtime overlays are merged and the modification state is cleared.

method.name: revert_runtime_changes
method.description: Discards all pending runtime modifications, restoring splats to their original stored values.

method.name: apply_brush_stroke
method.description: Applies a spherical brush stroke at [param center] with the given [param radius], [param color], [param opacity], and [param hardness]. Affected splats have their colors blended in the runtime overlay.

method.name: get_brush_strokes
method.description: Returns an array of dictionaries representing all recorded brush strokes. Each dictionary contains "center", "radius", "color", "opacity", "hardness", and "timestamp" keys.

method.name: clear_brush_strokes
method.description: Clears all recorded brush strokes from the internal history.

method.name: set_brush_strokes
method.description: Replaces the internal brush stroke history with [param strokes]. Each element must be a dictionary matching the format returned by [method get_brush_strokes].

method.name: capture_brush_affected_state
method.description: Captures and returns the current state of all splats within [param radius] of [param center] as a dictionary. Used for undo/redo support in painting workflows.

method.name: restore_brush_stroke
method.description: Restores splat state from a dictionary previously returned by [method capture_brush_affected_state]. Used to undo brush strokes.

members.member: When enabled, splats are rendered as oriented 2D surfels rather than 3D ellipsoids. Requires surface normals to be set via [method set_normals].
The total number of Gaussian splats in this resource. Read-only.
Controls whether animation playback is active. When disabled, animated property queries return base values.
